🔧 Bash(python3 -c "
import torch

# Design a 65-residue protein with topology:
# Helix1(15) - Loop(5) - Strand1(8) - Loop(5) - Strand2(8) - Loop(5) - Helix2(15) - Loop(4)
# SS encoding: 0=helix, 1=strand, 2=loop

ss = []
# Helix 1: 15 residues
ss += [0]*15
# Loop: 5
ss += [2]*5
# Strand 1: 8
ss += [1]*8
